headline: Newmont (NEM): The Best Precious Metal Stock to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts
summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) is one of the 15 Best Precious Metal Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. On April 28, 2026, TD Securities analyst Steven Green raised his price target on Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) to $129 from $116 previously and maintained a Hold rating following the company’s strong Q1 report. headline: Barrick Targets Year-End IPO For North America Unit Valued Above $60 Billion
summary: Plans New York listing, retains majority stake, and advances spinoff including Nevada Gold Mines and Fourmile project.
